message:
test(labruntime): add 11 asupersync runtime primitive tests (ft-1m7nk)

LabRuntime tests for the observation loop's async primitive layer:
- RwLock contention + read-write upgrade pattern (registry/cursors)
- Bounded mpsc channel backpressure and FIFO ordering
- Channel close/drop cleanup and multi-producer fan-in
- Backpressure classification tier logic
- Watch channel hot-reload propagation with multiple receivers
- Mutex exclusion for single-writer state
- Adaptive polling sleep behavior
- RuntimeConfig defaults under asupersync

Note: Full ObservationRuntime integration tests await task module
migration from tokio::spawn to asupersync (task::spawn still uses
tokio, which panics without a reactor under RuntimeFixture).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
